name: Premier Investments Limited
analysis: PMV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$14.4000. Trade idea: entry A$14.7900, stop A$13.2957, target A$19.2729 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
